changelog: Removed Region column from Images and Flavors tabs
Updates tab matches reference: auto-check/load, accordion panels, Upgrade/Downgrade buttons, compareVersions, formatReleaseNotes, PHP/WHMCS version shown
Fixed: check_update always showed 'Failed' due to missing success key in response
Fixed: release tags showed 'V' - get_all_releases now formats raw GitHub API data into version/download_url fields
Fixed: No Download Available - browser_download_url now correctly mapped from assets
Fixed: release description overflowed left side
